abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: Models in this units have an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor's Judgement
abilities.description: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abilities.name: Recount the Deeds of the Saints
abilities.description: While this unit is leading a unit and contains and Agathae Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Extremis Trigger Word
abilities.description: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the HAZARDOUS ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Holy Crusader
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.

abilities.name: Pious Reputation
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model gained more XP than any other unit from your Crusade army during that battle.

abilities.name: Glory to the Emperor
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle for each Miracle dice remaining in your Miracle Dice pool (to a maximum of 2 Saint points).

abilities.name: Beacon of Divine Grace
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model performed 3 or more Acts of Faith during that battle.

abilities.name: Martyr's Wounds
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle if this model is below its Starting Strength. Gain 2 Saint points instead if this model was destroyed while within range of an objective marker.

abilities.name: Scars of the Penitent
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points each time this model gains a Martyr point.

abilities.name: Consecrate Ground
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

abilities.name: Divine Will
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model's unit did not fail a Battle-shock test during that battle.

abilities.name: Slay the Demagogue
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed one or more enemy **^^Character^^** units during that battle. Gain an additional 2 Saint points if one of those destroyed units contained the enemy **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Smite the Unbelievers
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed 5 or more enemy models during that battle.

abilities.name: Blazing Soulfire
abilities.description: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of the Emperor
abilities.description: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.

abilities.name: Miraculous Recovery
abilities.description: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Boundless Faith
abilities.description: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Intoning Hymns of Battle
abilities.description:
Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, if you have one or more **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units on the battlefield and if your Crusade army was led in prayer before this battle, you can discard two Miracle dice. If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

When you intone Hymns of Battle, you can either select one Hymn to apply to units from your army from the list, or you can randomly select two by rolling two D6 and consulting the table (if a double is rolled, roll both dice again until two different results are rolled).

abilities.name: The Emperor's Grace
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Divine Aspect
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

abilities.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Litanies of Faith
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Saintly Example
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Through Suffering, Strength
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

abilities.name: Mantle of Ophelia
abilities.description: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
abilities.description: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

abilities.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Verse of Holy Piety
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

abilities.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Rage
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you discarded (to a maximum of 6).

abilities.name: Fire and Fury
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Unflinching Determination
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Divine Aspect
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

abilities.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Litanies of Faith
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Saintly Example
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Through Suffering, Strength
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

abilities.name: Mantle of Ophelia
abilities.description: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
abilities.description: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

abilities.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Verse of Holy Piety
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

abilities.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Rage
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you discarded (to a maximum of 6).

abilities.name: Fire and Fury
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Triptych of Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mark of Devotion
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Oracle
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Sanctified Amulet
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer

abilities.name: Holy Crusader
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.

abilities.name: Pious Reputation
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model gained more XP than any other unit from your Crusade army during that battle.

abilities.name: Glory to the Emperor
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle for each Miracle dice remaining in your Miracle Dice pool (to a maximum of 2 Saint points).

abilities.name: Beacon of Divine Grace
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model performed 3 or more Acts of Faith during that battle.

abilities.name: Martyr's Wounds
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle if this model is below its Starting Strength. Gain 2 Saint points instead if this model was destroyed while within range of an objective marker.

abilities.name: Scars of the Penitent
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points each time this model gains a Martyr point.

abilities.name: Consecrate Ground
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

abilities.name: Divine Will
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model's unit did not fail a Battle-shock test during that battle.

abilities.name: Slay the Demagogue
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed one or more enemy **^^Character^^** units during that battle. Gain an additional 2 Saint points if one of those destroyed units contained the enemy **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Smite the Unbelievers
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed 5 or more enemy models during that battle.

abilities.name: Blazing Soulfire
abilities.description: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of the Emperor
abilities.description: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.

abilities.name: Miraculous Recovery
abilities.description: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Boundless Faith
abilities.description: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Intoning Hymns of Battle
abilities.description:
Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, if you have one or more **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units on the battlefield and if your Crusade army was led in prayer before this battle, you can discard two Miracle dice. If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mark of Devotion
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Oracle
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Sanctified Amulet
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer

abilities.name: Holy Crusader
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.

abilities.name: Pious Reputation
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model gained more XP than any other unit from your Crusade army during that battle.

abilities.name: Glory to the Emperor
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle for each Miracle dice remaining in your Miracle Dice pool (to a maximum of 2 Saint points).

abilities.name: Beacon of Divine Grace
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model performed 3 or more Acts of Faith during that battle.

abilities.name: Martyr's Wounds
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle if this model is below its Starting Strength. Gain 2 Saint points instead if this model was destroyed while within range of an objective marker.

abilities.name: Scars of the Penitent
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points each time this model gains a Martyr point.

abilities.name: Consecrate Ground
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

abilities.name: Divine Will
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model's unit did not fail a Battle-shock test during that battle.

abilities.name: Slay the Demagogue
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed one or more enemy **^^Character^^** units during that battle. Gain an additional 2 Saint points if one of those destroyed units contained the enemy **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Smite the Unbelievers
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed 5 or more enemy models during that battle.

abilities.name: Blazing Soulfire
abilities.description: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of the Emperor
abilities.description: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.

abilities.name: Miraculous Recovery
abilities.description: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Boundless Faith
abilities.description: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Intoning Hymns of Battle
abilities.description:
Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, if you have one or more **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units on the battlefield and if your Crusade army was led in prayer before this battle, you can discard two Miracle dice. If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

When you intone Hymns of Battle, you can either select one Hymn to apply to units from your army from the list, or you can randomly select two by rolling two D6 and consulting the table (if a double is rolled, roll both dice again until two different results are rolled).

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.description:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, DOMINION SQUAD or SISTERS NOVITIATE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

abilities.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Litanies of Faith
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Saintly Example
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Through Suffering, Strength
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

abilities.name: Mantle of Ophelia
abilities.description: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
abilities.description: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

abilities.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Verse of Holy Piety
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

abilities.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Rage

abilities.name: Manual of Saint Griselda

If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

When you intone Hymns of Battle, you can either select one Hymn to apply to units from your army from the list, or you can randomly select two by rolling two D6 and consulting the table (if a double is rolled, roll both dice again until two different results are rolled).

abilities.name: Endless Suffering
abilities.description: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Holy Crusader
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.

abilities.name: Pious Reputation
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model gained more XP than any other unit from your Crusade army during that battle.

abilities.name: Glory to the Emperor
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle for each Miracle dice remaining in your Miracle Dice pool (to a maximum of 2 Saint points).

abilities.name: Beacon of Divine Grace
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model performed 3 or more Acts of Faith during that battle.

abilities.name: Martyr's Wounds
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle if this model is below its Starting Strength. Gain 2 Saint points instead if this model was destroyed while within range of an objective marker.

abilities.name: Scars of the Penitent
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points each time this model gains a Martyr point.

abilities.name: Consecrate Ground
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

abilities.name: Divine Will
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model's unit did not fail a Battle-shock test during that battle.

abilities.name: Slay the Demagogue
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed one or more enemy **^^Character^^** units during that battle. Gain an additional 2 Saint points if one of those destroyed units contained the enemy **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Smite the Unbelievers
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed 5 or more enemy models during that battle.

abilities.name: Blazing Soulfire
abilities.description: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of the Emperor
abilities.description: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.

abilities.name: Miraculous Recovery
abilities.description: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Boundless Faith
abilities.description: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Smiting
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Zealot
abilities.description: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

abilities.name: Holy Mission
abilities.description: If this model is attached to a Dominion Squad during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Scouts 6" ability. If this model is attached to a Sisters Novitiate Squad during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Divine Aspect
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

abilities.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Litanies of Faith
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Saintly Example
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Through Suffering, Strength
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

abilities.name: Mantle of Ophelia
abilities.description: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
abilities.description: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

abilities.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Verse of Holy Piety
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

abilities.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Rage
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you discarded (to a maximum of 6).

abilities.name: Fire and Fury
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Triptych of Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mark of Devotion
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Oracle
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Sanctified Amulet
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer

abilities.name: Relics of the Matriarchs
abilities.description: At the start of the battle round, select up to two of the abilities in the Relics of the Matriarchs section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has those abilities.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - The Fiery Heart (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, add 2" to that unit's Move characteristic and add 1 to the Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Censer of the Sacred Rose (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll all Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Simulacrum of the Ebon Chalice (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of only one.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Simulacrum of the Argent Shroud (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Icon of the Valorous Heart (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Petals of the Bloody Rose (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by model in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Solemn Procession
abilities.description: Each time you gain 1 Miracle dice at the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, do not roll one D6 to determine the value of that Miracle dice; it has a value of 6.’

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Embodied Prophecy
abilities.description:
Each time this unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase:
- Sustained Hits 1
- Lethal Hits


If this unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, select both abilities above to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 5+.

abilities.name: Sacred Banner
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Holy Crusader
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.

abilities.name: Pious Reputation
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model gained more XP than any other unit from your Crusade army during that battle.

abilities.name: Glory to the Emperor
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle for each Miracle dice remaining in your Miracle Dice pool (to a maximum of 2 Saint points).

abilities.name: Beacon of Divine Grace
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model performed 3 or more Acts of Faith during that battle.

abilities.name: Martyr's Wounds
abilities.description: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle if this model is below its Starting Strength. Gain 2 Saint points instead if this model was destroyed while within range of an objective marker.

abilities.name: Scars of the Penitent
abilities.description: Gain 3 Saint points each time this model gains a Martyr point.

abilities.name: Consecrate Ground
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

abilities.name: Divine Will
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model's unit did not fail a Battle-shock test during that battle.

abilities.name: Slay the Demagogue
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed one or more enemy **^^Character^^** units during that battle. Gain an additional 2 Saint points if one of those destroyed units contained the enemy **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Smite the Unbelievers
abilities.description: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed 5 or more enemy models during that battle.

abilities.name: Blazing Soulfire
abilities.description: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of the Emperor
abilities.description: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.

abilities.name: Miraculous Recovery
abilities.description: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Boundless Faith
abilities.description: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Intoning Hymns of Battle
abilities.description:
Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, if you have one or more **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units on the battlefield and if your Crusade army was led in prayer before this battle, you can discard two Miracle dice. If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

When you intone Hymns of Battle, you can either select one Hymn to apply to units from your army from the list, or you can randomly select two by rolling two D6 and consulting the table (if a double is rolled, roll both dice again until two different results are rolled).

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.description: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Emergency Combat Embarkation
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this TRANSPORT, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

abilities.name: Divine Deliverance
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Divine Aspect
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

abilities.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Litanies of Faith
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Saintly Example
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Through Suffering, Strength
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

abilities.name: Mantle of Ophelia
abilities.description: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
abilities.description: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

abilities.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Verse of Holy Piety
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

abilities.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
abilities.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
abilities.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Rage
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you discarded (to a maximum of 6).

abilities.name: Fire and Fury
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Triptych of Judgement
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mark of Devotion
abilities.description: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Oracle
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Sanctified Amulet
abilities.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer

While an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army is within 1" of this FORTIFICATION, that unit can perform one additional Act of Faith per phase.

abilities.name: Holy Cover
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.description: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of the Emperor
abilities.description: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.

abilities.name: Miraculous Recovery
abilities.description: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Boundless Faith
abilities.description: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

abilities.name: Righteous Judgement
abilities.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Intoning Hymns of Battle
abilities.description:
Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, if you have one or more **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units on the battlefield and if your Crusade army was led in prayer before this battle, you can discard two Miracle dice. If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

When you intone Hymns of Battle, you can either select one Hymn to apply to units from your army from the list, or you can randomly select two by rolling two D6 and consulting the table (if a double is rolled, roll both dice again until two different results are rolled).

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a ^^**Transport**^^.
